$schema-note: The Pantry's Market: a curated list of MCP servers the user can stock. Enabling one materializes an entry in servers.json. `{{path}}` in args is replaced with a folder/file the user picks. Add your own entries here to grow the Market.

entries.name: Lemonade Gateway
entries.blurb: Your local lemond's own tools: chat, omni, image generation, audio transcription, and model listing. No install needed.

entries.name: Filesystem
entries.blurb: Read and write files under a folder you choose. Lets the agent work with local documents and code.
entries.pathLabel: Root folder the agent may access

entries.name: Web Fetch
entries.blurb: Fetch a URL and convert the page to clean markdown for the model to read.

entries.name: Git
entries.blurb: Inspect and operate on a local Git repository: status, diffs, log, and commits.

entries.name: Memory
entries.blurb: A persistent knowledge-graph memory the agent can write to and recall across turns.

entries.name: SQLite
entries.blurb: Query and modify a local SQLite database file.
